query: SELECT u.id, u.email, u.name, u.role, (u.passwordHash IS NOT NULL) as hasPassword, e.companyName, e.companyCode FROM users u LEFT JOIN erp_companies e ON u.erpCompanyId = e.id ORDER BY e.id, u.id;
